design_philosophy: Editorial, Premium, Gallery-first. Minimal visual noise, high reliance on typography hierarchy, generous whitespace. Think Sézane, Aesop, Officine Universelle Buly. The goal is to create a digital flagship store that feels like reading a high-end fashion or lifestyle magazine.

fonts.name: Cormorant Garamond
fonts.usage: All headings, large quotes, editorial callouts. Use font-light or font-normal. Never black/heavy. Apply tracking-tighter for large sizes.

fonts.name: Inter
fonts.usage: Body text, UI elements, buttons, overlines, prices. Use with wide tracking for overlines (tracking-widest) and uppercase.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-serif
scale.overline: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans font-medium text-charcoal/60

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. 2-3x more spacing than typical e-commerce. Let the products breathe. Use padding such as p-12, p-20, p-32.
spacing_and_layout.grid: CSS Grid, gap-8 to gap-16. Use asymmetrical grids for editorial features to create tension and visual interest.

announcement_bar.layout: Sticky top, z-[60]. bg-charcoal text-white text-xs tracking-[0.2em] py-2.5 text-center uppercase.

header.layout: Sticky below announcement bar, z-50. bg-ivory/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/40. Logo centered, nav links left, utility icons (search, wishlist, cart) right.
header.icons: Use lucide-react with stroke-width 1.25 for a delicate, refined look.

hero.layout: Full width or 95vw inset. Split layout: 50% image, 50% typography block on warm_beige, OR 100% image with a minimal bg-black/20 overlay to ensure text contrast.
hero.content: CMS-driven headline (H1), subtext, and a sharp, charcoal CTA button. Typography must be left-aligned or perfectly centered depending on the image composition.

product_card.layout: Aspect ratio 3:4 or 2:3 (tall) for images. Clean ivory background. Text below image.
product_card.image_hover: Show secondary image on hover, or subtle scale (1.05) with 0.6s ease transition.
product_card.typography: Product name in Serif (text-lg), Price in Sans (text-base). TTC note in text-xs text-charcoal-light.
product_card.actions: Wishlist heart top-right (absolute). 'Ajouter au panier' quick add button fades in at the bottom of the image on hover.

cart_drawer.layout: Right side slide-over, 100vh, w-full sm:w-[450px]. bg-ivory shadow-2xl.
cart_drawer.content: List of items, subtotal, shipping estimator (free shipping progress bar in gold), secure payment icons, massive Charcoal checkout button.

buttons.primary: bg-charcoal text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase transition-colors duration-300 hover:bg-gold hover:text-white
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-charcoal text-charcoal rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase transition-colors duration-300 hover:bg-charcoal hover:text-white

pdp.layout: 2-column on desktop. Sticky right column (product info). Left column: stacked large images or elegant asymmetrical grid.
pdp.elements: TTC price with TVA note (e.g., 'TVA incluse'), Stock badge, 'Ajouter au panier' sticky mobile bar (bottom fixed on mobile), Shadcn Accordion for descriptions/delivery/returns.

filters_sidebar.layout: Left sidebar on desktop, Shadcn Sheet on mobile.
filters_sidebar.style: Minimalist Shadcn Checkboxes, clean Shadcn Slider (accent colored gold), Shadcn Accordion groups for categories.

search_modal.layout: Full screen overlay or large top-aligned modal. Clean input with border-b only. Shows recent and suggested products instantly.

gdpr_banner.layout: Fixed bottom, full width or floating card bottom-left. bg-white border border-border shadow-lg p-6.
gdpr_banner.actions: Primary accept, secondary customize, minimal text link for decline.

footer.layout: py-24 bg-charcoal text-white. 4 columns: Brand info/Logo, Shop, Legal, Newsletter.
footer.newsletter: Minimal input line (border-b border-white/30 bg-transparent text-white focus:border-gold), no heavy box. Trust badges (Visa, Mastercard, PayPal) displayed subtly in grayscale or white.

hero.headline: L'Élégance Redéfinie.
hero.subtext: Découvrez notre nouvelle collection, pensée pour sublimer votre quotidien avec des matières nobles et un savoir-faire unique.

cart.title: Votre Panier
cart.empty: Votre panier est vide. Découvrez nos nouveautés.
cart.shipping_note: Frais de port calculés à l'étape suivante.
cart.shipping_estimator: Plus que 45,00 € pour la livraison offerte.

product.ttc_note: Prix TTC, hors frais de livraison.

gdpr_banner.text: Nous utilisons des cookies pour sublimer votre expérience, analyser notre trafic et vous proposer des offres personnalisées.

image_urls.description: Artistic portrait of a fashionable woman posing on a staircase with pearls.
Woman in a silver metallic dress, elegant studio shot. Great for featured categories.
Minimalist interior, lamp and books on a table. Ideal for home/lifestyle category.
Warm sunlight streams across a wooden cabinet. Perfect for 'Why choose us' sections.
Clear glass perfume bottle on white silk textile. Excellent for product detail or best sellers.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You MUST use functional, accessible React components. Utilize existing Shadcn UI components from /app/frontend/src/components/ui/. If missing, build them using Tailwind following Shadcn principles.
Do not use generic centered text for editorial layouts. Use asymmetrical alignments, robust CSS Grid, and generous whitespace.
Implement glass-morphism sparingly and ONLY when content scrolls underneath (e.g., sticky header: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-ivory/90`).
NEVER use generic placeholder images or text. Use the provided French copy and image URLs.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="add-to-cart-btn"`).
Include a GDPR cookie banner at the bottom. It's mandatory for the French market.
Ensure TTC (Toutes Taxes Comprises) is displayed next to prices where appropriate.
Currency must be formatted in EUR. Example: `45,00 €`. Note the comma instead of decimal point, and the space before the euro symbol.
Buttons should be sharp (`rounded-none`) to reflect a premium editorial feel, contrary to bubbly SaaS buttons.
Ensure high contrast ratios (WCAG AA). Charcoal text on Ivory/Warm Beige backgrounds.
Avoid `transition: all`. Target specific properties like `transition-colors`, `transition-opacity`, or `transition-transform`.
Implement scroll-triggered fade-in animations for product cards and editorial sections using Framer Motion (or simple CSS intersections) for a premium feel.
Ensure the mobile experience has a sticky Add to Cart bar at the bottom of the screen on the Product Detail Page.
Follow the Anti-AI Designer principles: prioritize tension, contrast, and emotion over safe, symmetrical layouts.
